label: Software Engineer (AI Platform) at Replika
headline: Software Engineer (AI Platform) - Backend Systems, LLM Integration, Scalable Services, Python

cognition.title: LLM Orchestration System (Personal Project)
cognition.summary: Developed a .NET-based agentic orchestration system that integrates LLMs with tools and background workers, focusing on durable workflows and structured pipelines for planning and execution.
description: Architected and built a .NET-based agentic orchestration system to wrap LLMs with tools, background workers, and structured pipelines.
Designed for durable workflows, message/state tracking, and clear separation between model calls and application logic for reliable AI service operation.
Leveraged PostgreSQL for robust state management in LLM-driven processes.

storable.title: Software Engineer II (Backend Services)
description: Built and maintained .NET Core services with Hangfire, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server to support high-scale insurance auto-protect features.
Added background jobs and APIs to keep coverage, eligibility, and billing data in sync across desktop and web products, ensuring data consistency and reliability.
Clarified service boundaries and domain concepts, contributing to the team’s adoption of domain-driven design for scalable systems.

iadvantage.title: Lead Developer / Azure DevOps (Backend & Systems Design)
description: Led delivery of GLP-compliant lab software with dynamic user-defined data models and custom reporting, ensuring traceability and audit trails for high-availability systems.
Designed and built ASP.NET WebForms/MVC/WebAPI services with RESTful OData and SOAP APIs backed by Oracle, emphasizing scalable and reliable data exchange.
Guided release engineering and Azure DevOps practices for builds, deployments, and database migrations across environments, ensuring continuous integration and delivery.
Mentored developers through code reviews and pairing to raise quality and foster robust system and software design patterns.

solid-earth.title: Application Developer/Architect (Real-time Systems & Performance)
description: Developed and maintained RETS client and server software on Oracle and C#, achieving high performance and compliance, recognized as one of the fastest servers in the continental US.
Tuned RETS performance, protocol compliance, and data handling to keep broker and MLS integrations reliable, optimizing for sub-second latency and high availability.
Built configurable ASP.NET MLS frontends and created a market analytics and statistics module, coordinating deployments for high uptime and data freshness.
Evolved the platform’s architecture, providing ongoing support and troubleshooting for MLS customers in a real-time data environment.

rural-sourcing.title: Senior Software Developer (Backend & Technical Leadership)
description: Delivered Microsoft-stack backend projects for multiple clients, moving between WinForms, ASP.NET, and SQL Server work while ensuring project quality and adherence to best practices.
Mentored junior and mid-level developers on coding standards, testing habits, and practical estimation, serving as a force multiplier for team productivity.
Planned and tracked sprints, risks, and milestones, keeping stakeholders aligned across simultaneous projects and driving execution with velocity and ownership.

prestage-farms.title: Programmer/Analyst (System Modernization)
description: Led a team of 6 developers and 3 QA to modernize legacy VB6 accounting and inventory systems into a cohesive .NET application with role-based security.
Analyzed legacy VB6 patterns and built transformation modules to automate conversion while preserving critical business logic.
Implemented a custom bug reporting and ticketing system that auto-promoted tickets into JIRA via APIs, improving feedback loops and system reliability.
Ran Agile roadmaps and milestones, coordinating stakeholders and demos to deliver the modernization ahead of schedule and establish robust solutions for future growth.
